meaning: n.趾,脚趾,足尖vt.以趾踏触,用脚尖走vi.动脚尖 [军] Tables of Organization and Equipment,编制及装备表
examples: I stubbed my toe on the step.
Ouch! You trod on my toe!
My right toe struck against a submerged rock.
Invented in a pub in the 1970s, toe wrestling plays out very much like a traditional arm-wrestling match.
Not all women tip-toe around others, lack assertiveness or undermine themselves when communicating with others.
